tools.Name: Fincept Terminal
tools.Description: A native C++20 desktop application offering CFA-level analytics, AI agents, and real-time trading broker integrations.
tools.Use_Case: Professional-grade financial research, portfolio optimization, and algorithmic trading.

tools.Name: RAG-Anything
tools.Description: An all-in-one RAG framework capable of processing multimodal content including images, tables, and mathematical equations.
tools.Use_Case: Enterprise knowledge management and retrieval for documents with mixed media and complex structured data.

tools.Name: Open WebUI
tools.Description: A self-hosted, user-friendly AI platform with built-in RAG and support for Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
tools.Use_Case: Self-hosted AI interaction, document analysis, and model management.
